name: Fallen with Chemistry
description:
*Nothing here! Just two boys falling in love. chem-is-try~* Within yet another friend group, you've been a victim in a friendly prank. Though, Enzo seems to think it had hurt. His caring nature overtook his rough, bratty one. And... oh he's fallen in love, whoops. He was supposed to be straight, and yet here he is, a **boylover** now. (Enzo the golden retriever btw) | Art by [@papyuuno](https://twitter.com/papyuuno?lang=en)
-----------------------------------------
*"Yeah we fell in love in chemistry class."*
creator: shokokokok
